name: Eggs in Green Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mayonnaise, sour cream, and lemon juice.
2. Finely chop one hard-cooked egg and stir it into the mayonnaise mixture.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
4. Thoroughly rinse the chopped fresh herbs (such as dill, chives, parsley, tarragon, or basil), pat them dry, and blend with the sauce.
5. Slice the remaining hard-cooked eggs in half and arrange them in the sauce to serve.
